programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: The Point
programme.desc: Featuring highlights, news, analysis, speed, skill and access to the stars, stories and personalities of the game; hosted by John Buccigross.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Eastern Conference Second Round, Game 7. (if necessary).

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Get Up
programme.desc: ESPN's morning show features host Mike Greenberg with a rotating and diverse group of analysts opining about and analyzing the latest news from the world of sports. The two-hour, personality-driven show originates from Hudson Square in Lower Manhattan, a modern media hub for ESPN and The Walt Disney Company's New York-based teams. Greenberg, aka "Greeny," is formerly one-half of ESPN Radio's longt

programme.title: Live: First Take
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith hosts this weekday morning sports debate show. Smith provides his expert takes on the day's trending sports topics and under-the-radar news. They're regularly joined by veteran analysts and the top guests in sports and entertainment.

programme.title: Live: The Pat McAfee Show
programme.desc: Former NFL punter Pat McAfee brings his humor and candor to the microphone to highlight the day's top stories.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NBA Today
programme.desc: In-depth, comprehensive daily coverage of all aspects of the NBA from expert analysts.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: NBA Tip-Off
programme.desc: Host Ernie Johnson and analysts Shaquille O'Neal, Charles Barkley and Kenny Smith ready viewers for NBA action before ESPN's Wednesday night doubleheaders (and other select telecasts). Guest analysts also are featured from time to time.

programme.title: Live: NBA Courtside
programme.desc: An insight into upcoming National Basketball Association matches, highlighting the players to watch and the top team news.

programme.title: Racing Replay
programme.desc: Another chance to watch today's racing action from Carlisle and Redcar.

programme.title: Irish Racing Replay
programme.desc: Another chance to watch yesterday's racing action from Roscommon.

programme.desc: Angus McNae returns to crunch the numbers on the new flat season.

programme.title: Mark Your Card
programme.desc: A preview of the day's racing with live news from the courses.

programme.title: Live Racing
programme.desc: Today's live racing action from Nottingham, Huntingdon and Cork.

programme.desc: Another chance to watch today's racing action from Nottingham and Huntingdon.

programme.title: Women's College Tennis
programme.desc: From Dan Magill Tennis Complex in Athens, Ga.

programme.title: Men's College Tennis
programme.desc: From Dan Magill Tennis Complex in Athens, Ga.

programme.title: CFP National Championship
programme.desc: Top-seeded Indiana (15-0) faces No. 10 Miami in the CFP National Championship. After routing Oregon in the semifinals, the Hoosiers look to complete a perfect season against a Hurricanes team that has a 13-2 overall scoring record.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: At Cisco's, open since 1950, the migas and huevos rancheros are good as ever; on the east side, tracking Kareem El-Ghayesh of KG BBQ, a new arrival from Cairo, Egypt, who has learned to two-step and introduced Texas to pomegranate-speckled ribs.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Exploring the oil and cattle work that puts money in pockets and ribeyes on tables; Cattlemen's Steakhouse, open since 1910, sits hard by the Oklahoma National Stockyards; Junior's Supper Club, owned by the Shumsky family.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: John T. Edge travels around the region, introducing viewers to Southern tastemakers, food, culture and history.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Singleton grew up in Greenwood, S.C. and now lives on the outskirts of Spartanburg with his partner Glenda Guion, a ceramicist; they make their living as artists, working in side-by-side backyard sheds, accompanied by their dog, Cleo.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: The crew joins their guide Caleb Johnson at the onetime center of the Alabama coal mining industry as they document the legacies of that hard work; Johnson has plenty of familiarity with the area as grew up in the nearby town of Arley.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 6 Fighting Irish face a tough test in the No. 10 Hurricanes. Miami won the last meeting, 41-8 in 2017. Notre Dame came up short against Ohio State 34-23 in the national title game last season. Miami was ranked as high as No. 4 in 2024.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Gators visit the No. 4 Hurricanes in a Florida Cup contest. In 2024, Miami won the first renewal of the three-way rivalry series in five years, beating Florida 41-17 in the process. Miami comes off a 49-12 beatdown of then-No. 18 South Florida.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 3 Hurricanes visit the No. 18 Seminoles. Miami leads the rivalry series 36-33 after beating Florida State 36-14 in 2024. FSU is coming off a double-overtime loss to Virginia on Sept. 26. Miami last played Sept. 20, beating Florida 26-7.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Cardinals (4-1, 1-1 ACC) try to bounce back against a tough foe in the No. 2 Hurricanes (5-0, 1-0). Louisville dropped its first game of the season in a 30-27 overtime decision versus Virginia on Oct. 4. Miami defeated Louisville 52-45 last year.

programme.title: Courtside
programme.desc: Tennis highlights from recent matches.

programme.title: Courtside
programme.desc: Tennis highlights from recent matches.

programme.desc: Coverage of professional tennis matches.

programme.title: Courtside
programme.desc: Tennis highlights from recent matches.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: High School Baseball
programme.desc: High school baseball action.

programme.title: Fight Sports: World Class Championship Boxing
programme.desc: From Potsdam, Germany.

programme.title: Fight Sports MMA
programme.desc: Cheyanne Vlismas vs. Karolina Wojcik, strawweights bout. Bonus coverage includes Rodrique Kena vs. Sifiso Ngcobo.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: Fight Sports: World Championship Kickboxing
programme.desc: Competitions in kickboxing and Mui Thai.

programme.title: Fight Sports: Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Featuring Kisenosato, Kakuryu, Harumafuji and Hakuho from the Natsu basho, in 2014.

programme.title: Fight Sports: Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Presenting sumo by covering the rules, ranks, matchups and more.

programme.title: Fight Sports Martial Arts
programme.desc: Coverage of judo, sumo, karate and other disciplines of martial arts.

programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.desc: From May 09, 2008.

programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Liverpool Football
programme.desc: An encore presentation of Liverpool's on-field action from the past week plus behind-the-scenes team access and social media clips.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: A showcase of the most popular videos and social media highlights from across Liverpool Football Club, its players and its supporters.

programme.title: World Chase Tag
programme.desc: Parkour and Ninja Warrior athletes compete against each other in high-level action matches of tag during international tournaments.

programme.title: Life in Between Gates
programme.desc: Following racers as they prepare for their first event of the season in Colorado.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Chips, words, and chicken wings are flying at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.desc: MLB insider Ken Rosenthal covers baseball's latest news and pressing issues.

programme.desc: A look back at the all-English clash between Man United and Chelsea in 2008. Plus, Real Madrid's victory against city rivals Atletico in 2014.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: Previewing all the competing teams.

programme.title: Major League Fishing
programme.desc: Four teams compete in elimination match 2 to advance to the Knockout Rounds. From Shreveport-Bossier City, La.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Bobby Bakewell is a Bassmaster Classic qualifier who honed his fishing skills through countless hours on the water with his father. He shares how his dad's guidance and passion for the sport shaped his journey and success as an angler.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: The Short List
programme.desc: The sports countdown, featuring iconic themes focused upon the memorable moments and individuals in sports; the 10 memorable debuts, the 10 revered innovators, the comebacks of all time and much more.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Stories behind celebrated events, institutions, clubs, players, rivalries and moments in sport.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: Previewing all the competing teams.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: Swing Clinic With Jimmy Hanlin
programme.desc: Golf tips, strategy and review of products.

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: UFC Fight Flashback

programme.desc: Coverage from the 10th stage of the race, an individual time trial 42km route from Viareggio to Massa.

programme.title: Uphill Climb
programme.desc: The inspirational journey of the Women's Tour de France, held from 1984-1989. These athletes defied norms and paved the way for today's Tour de France Avec Zwift.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Blue Jays and Yankees clash in the Bronx to kick off a four-game American League series. New York boasts a stellar winning record at home, while Toronto aims to overcome early road struggles. This marks their first meeting of the 2026 campaign.

programme.title: Live: Blair & Barker
programme.desc: Jeff Blair and Kevin Barker talk all things Blue Jays, and Major League Baseball.

programme.title: Live: The FAN Pregame
programme.desc: Ailish Forfar and Justin Cuthbert discuss the stories that matter most to sports fans.

programme.title: NHL in 30
programme.desc: Replays of NHL contests in a shortened duration.

programme.title: Live: Hockey Central
programme.desc: Breaking news, analysis and debate from around the NHL.

programme.title: Live: Stanley Cup Playoffs
programme.desc: News, action and highlights from the National Hockey League's Stanley Cup Playoffs.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: The targets abound when Steven hunts feral goats on the Big Island of Hawaii, then picks up a rod to fish for wahoo and gray snapper offshore.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Spear-fishing champion and chef Kim Werner hosts Steven and Cal on a dive off the Kona coast of Hawaii that results in a feast of seafood delicacies.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Colorado mule deer via spot and stalk with bow, hard to beat!

programme.title: Bloodline Hunting
programme.desc: Travel with Matt Bullins as he journeys through grassroots America, seeking out new adventures and uncovering the rich bloodlines that define our hunting culture. Along the way, he highlights the people, histories, and experiences that keep these timeless traditions thriving.

programme.title: Night Crew
programme.desc: Some things just have to be experienced to fully understand!

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: Travis Price drives up to Saskatchewan to hunt in our favorite spring black bear camp.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Nick continues his grind in Ohio as the season is coming to an end.

programme.title: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: Predator Pursuit TV, hosted by Jeff Thomason, is a rare blend of fast action predator hunting and educational material all rolled into one. Jeff will be taking viewers all over the world chasing a variety of dangerous predators. Prepare to be entertained, and informed, on different tactics to help you become a more successful hunter and put more fur in the back of your truck!

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Innovative designs for new hunting products.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: The quest for the Royal Antelope.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: The targets abound when Steven hunts feral goats on the Big Island of Hawaii, then picks up a rod to fish for wahoo and gray snapper offshore.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Spear-fishing champion and chef Kim Werner hosts Steven and Cal on a dive off the Kona coast of Hawaii that results in a feast of seafood delicacies.

programme.title: Night Crew
programme.desc: Some things just have to be experienced to fully understand!

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: Travis Price drives up to Saskatchewan to hunt in our favorite spring black bear camp.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Nick continues his grind in Ohio as the season is coming to an end.

programme.title: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: Predator Pursuit TV, hosted by Jeff Thomason, is a rare blend of fast action predator hunting and educational material all rolled into one. Jeff will be taking viewers all over the world chasing a variety of dangerous predators. Prepare to be entertained, and informed, on different tactics to help you become a more successful hunter and put more fur in the back of your truck!

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Innovative designs for new hunting products.

programme.title: Hit Squad Outdoors With Tim Sylvia
programme.desc: This week we have Mav Sylvia and AJ Kerr and the boys are trying different ways to harvest a turkey.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Two Michigan conservation officers in two different districts deal with illegal bait for deer.

programme.title: Grace Camo and Lace
programme.desc: Grace, Camo & Lace follows the Armstrong sisters on hunting adventures across North America. While in pursuit of big and small game, Alli and Adriana bring a fresh look and youthful energy to the hunting industry. The sisters have been hunting since they were five years old and share a passion for hunting and the outdoor lifestyle. The entire Armstrong family gets in on the action as they join All

programme.title: The Gamekeepers of Mossy Oak
programme.desc: This week, we're talking ducks with Dr. Brad Cohen from Tennessee Tech and expert duck hunter Jim Ronquest (Drake Waterfowl). Brad is an engaging biologist studying how hunting pressure affects waterfowl movements.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: Fine fishing draws a crowd, fueling good times fishing and booming economic impact, as the In-Fisherman staff highlights exceptional fisheries from across North America; goes big-boat salmon slayin' out of Winthrop Harbor on Lake Michigan.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy goes aboard the Benthic Mariner and behind the scenes of the Atlantic Red Crab company with owner Jon Williams, a pillar of the American commercial fishing industry who has a few tricks up his sleeves when it comes to serving Atlantic red crab.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: The Crew is joined by Matt Kreifelf this week, as he celebrates his 50th birthday in The Bahamas with everyone.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straight forward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching plat

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and James Lindner head to a remote outpost to chase wilderness muskies on Lac Seul.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Doug Larsen joins his longtime friend and hunting partner Pat Pitt for a multi-generational adventure in the heart of the water-fowling mecca of Arkansas.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Colorado mule deer via spot and stalk with bow, hard to beat!

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: The Drury Outdoors Team hunts game and offers tips.

programme.title: MTN Top Outdoors
programme.desc: MTN Top Outdoors is brought to you by Butch Bauer and Jeremiah Voithofer, with a focus on the hunt, fish cook mentality. They showcase a program promoting family values, commitment to the outdoors and making memories through experiences of hunting and fishing. At the end of every episode, we have a 3-minute cooking segment featuring 5S star culinary chef Hunt Chef - Jeremy Critchfield.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: For the first time in years, the Keefer Brothers' boots hit the gravel in remote Alaska.

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and James Lindner head to a remote outpost to chase wilderness muskies on Lac Seul.

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.desc: Host and producer Mark Romanack shares his 30-plus years of professional fishing savvy with viewers.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Jovanni, Landon and Capt Don join Capt Chris Herrera for a redfish adventure in the tidal creeks of Palm Coast, Florida.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Nick continues his grind in Ohio as the season is coming to an end.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Innovative designs for new hunting products.

programme.title: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: Predator Pursuit TV, hosted by Jeff Thomason, is a rare blend of fast action predator hunting and educational material all rolled into one. Jeff will be taking viewers all over the world chasing a variety of dangerous predators. Prepare to be entertained, and informed, on different tactics to help you become a more successful hunter and put more fur in the back of your truck!

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Two Michigan conservation officers in two different districts deal with illegal bait for deer.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Scott Leysath hunts marsh hens in the salt marshes of South Carolina before meeting up with Laura Herriott on Sandy Island; Herriott is challenged with cooking a mixed bag of critters supplied by the chef.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: We discuss the use of the Henry Rifle in the Civil War.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Fishing captains search the coastal waters of southeastern U.S.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Jovanni, Landon and Capt Don join Capt Chris Herrera for a redfish adventure in the tidal creeks of Palm Coast, Florida.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: North Dakota delivers fast duck action to open the trip; when the plan falls apart mid-trip, the crew pivots-scouting in the morning, flushing pheasants in the afternoon and finishing strong over snow geese.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather harvests a seal during the herring spawn to make seal oil and to share traditional foods with her community.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original - an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken - his skills extend far be

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Biologist and conservationist Robert Abernethy guides Steven on a successful wild turkey hunt in the challenging swamps of South Carolina.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steven packs his bow for an elk-hunting trip into New Mexico's Lincoln National Forest with expert caller Jason Phelps, who bugles up some big bulls.

programme.title: Realtree's Monster Bucks
programme.desc: David Blanton explains how and why hunting with a muzzleloader is a great way to hunt.

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: Michael, Beth and Mike Lee are hunting in their home state of Georgia, filling tags and making memories.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Roger returns to Rancho Cuevas in Mexico to hunt for trophy whitetail bucks.

programme.desc: From May 17, 2026.

programme.desc: Toronto Blue Jays pregame show hosted by Jamie Campbell.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Blue Jays and Yankees clash in the Bronx to kick off a four-game American League series. New York boasts a stellar winning record at home, while Toronto aims to overcome early road struggles. This marks their first meeting of the 2026 campaign.

programme.desc: Canada's premier destination for sports and analysis.

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: 1 year ago Z and good friend Neil Vandebiezen had a magical Smallmouth day. Same spot, a year to the day later. Can they do it again?

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: Spencer Shuffield and Todd Goade fight for the Ultimate Match Fishing title on Lake of the Ozarks.

programme.title: MLF Team Series
programme.desc: Four teams compete in Florida for Elimination Match 1 of the Summit Cup to advance to the Knockout Rounds.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Champion anglers DeFoe and Lane compete to catch the largest bass.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Bassmaster Classic champion Ott DeFoe imitates Louisiana's crawfish population as he hunts down double-digit largemouth bass in the grassy lakes of Louisiana.

programme.title: Legends of Rod & Reel

programme.title: Bass Pro Shops Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: Bass move shallow during the spring; when they do so, they feed up on baitfish and shad. A bait that is very effective in these scenarios is a soft plastic jerkbait; host Wade Middleton breaks down all things soft plastic jerkbait fishing during the spring.

programme.title: Fishing University
programme.desc: Having your own bass fishing sanctuary is amazing, and the team from American Sportfish teaches us how to manage it!

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: New York Yankees v Toronto Blue Jays (Start-time 12.05am). Coverage of the American League match from Yankee Stadium, as the American League East rivals go head to head in the second game of a three-match series.
